subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God alone, and salutations upon Him after Whom there shall be no Prophet. All praise beseemeth the Desired One of the world and the Lord of nations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله وحده و الصلوه علی من لا نبی بعده حمد مقصود عالم و مالک امم را لایق
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Muhammad; Islam, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
